name: Rosehill Psychiatric Hospital (Modern RPG)
description:
For one reason or another you have just been admitted as the newest patient at Rosehill Psychiatric Hospital, a place for those who have lost control of their minds, whether by harming themselves, endangering others, or being labeled insane. What happens is up to you and you alone as you find ways to cope with your new living situation. Will you accept the so-called help offered to you, will you escape and carve your own path, or will you do something completely unpredictable? What happens is up to you and you alone as you find ways to cope with your new living situation.

Lore you might want to know:

Rosehill Psychiatric Hospital serves not only as a facility for the mentally ill but also as a prison for those deemed beyond help. On paper, it appears to be a place of treatment and rehabilitation, and from the outside, its grand structure gives the illusion of order and care. But beneath the surface lies a far darker reality.

The hospital is anything but pristine. Its history is riddled with controversy, marred by allegations involving both patients and staff. Chronic underfunding from the government and state has led to widespread neglect, mismanagement, and deteriorating conditions. Over time, frustration and disillusionment have festered among the staff, turning what should be a place of healing into something far more sinister.

Hello again, everyone! I don't have much to say about this one other than its kind of angsty and set in the same town as the Neglectful Family Bot. Its mainly just something I wanted to try out to see how it goes. :p Feel free to leave any comments below, and as always, thanks for checking it out! <3
creator: Rottenfeline
